rule: attribute-value normalization and escaping: a character reference such as 	 is re-serialized as 	 and a " is escaped as "
provenance: derived from W3C Canonical XML 1.0 REC (xml-c14n-20010315) §3.4 and XML 1.0 §3.3.3 (CDATA-type attribute-value normalization) rules; expected output computed by hand from the spec rules, not from a third-party tool. See v18 for the verbatim §3.4 REC worked example.
